doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_div_d (mpfr/src/div_d.c L25-L50). Compute b / c where b is MPFR and c is a machine double, rounded to `prec` bits under `rnd`. The C reference is a trivial wrapper: stack-allocate an mpfr_t at prec=53, mpfr_set_d (exact), then delegate to mpfr_div. The TS port mirrors: convert c -> MPFR at prec=53, then mpfr_div(b, dMpfr, prec, rnd). Class 'misc'; O(1) modulo mpfr_div cost.
c_signature: int mpfr_div_d(mpfr_ptr a, mpfr_srcptr b, double c, mpfr_rnd_t rnd_mode)
divergence_from_c: C mutates `a`; TS returns Result. c is bare JS number. Singular dispatch via mpfr_div: NaN / anything = NaN; +/-Inf / finite = +/-Inf (sign product); finite / +/-Inf = +/-0; +/-0 / +/-0 = NaN; +/-0 / finite-nonzero = +/-0 (sign product); finite-nonzero / +/-0 = +/-Inf (sign product). Sign of normal quotient = b.sign * c_sign. The MPFR_SAVE_EXPO / mpfr_check_range pattern is dropped -- TS has no global emax/emin state.
refs: mpfr/src/div_d.c L25-L50 -- the C reference body.
src/ops/set_d.ts -- load-bearing for the double->MPFR step.
CLAUDE.md 'Hallucination-risk callouts: Signed zero is real' -- division-by-zero specials.
CLAUDE.md 'Hallucination-risk callouts: Ternary flag is the sign of (rounded - exact)'.
